assertions.text: [rubric-1] Reads CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md before doing other work
assertions.evidence: The agent explicitly states that repo guidelines were extracted and provides a summary of conventions found within the typical project management files (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md) before proposing further technical steps.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Identifies the repo conventions (worktree location, branch naming, commit format)
assertions.evidence: The answer clearly identifies the required conventions: worktree location (../task-tracker.worktrees/<branch-name>), branch naming (<type>/<issue-number>-<short-desc>), and commit format (Conventional commits).

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Does not start coding before reading guidelines
assertions.evidence: The agent identifies the guidelines and assesses the codebase state first. It concludes by asking for permission to proceed to the 'explore' phase rather than jumping directly into code modifications.
